message: Use UDO args instead of inputs

files.patch:
@@ -6,8 +6,17 @@ description: |
 ---
 
 let $log_group = "/ecs/aws-demo-flow-logs"
+let $bucket = "aws-security-data-lake-eu-west-1-xxxxx"
+let $account_id = "123456789012"
+let $region = "eu-west-1"
+let $external_id = "tenzir"
+
 from_cloudwatch $log_group
 amazon::vpc_flow::parse_v7_ecs
 amazon::vpc_flow::to_ocsf
 amazon::security_lake::cast
-amazon::security_lake::send
+amazon::security_lake::send \
+  bucket=$bucket,
+  account_id=$account_id,
+  region=$region,
+  external_id=$external_id

@@ -1,13 +1,25 @@
 ---
 description: Sends OCSF events to Amazon Security Lake using the event's class_uid
+args:
+  named:
+    - name: bucket
+      type: string
+      description: The S3 bucket name in Security Lake
+    - name: account_id
+      type: string
+      description: The AWS account ID
+    - name: region
+      type: string
+      description: The AWS region
+    - name: external_id
+      type: string
+      description: The external ID for custom sources
+    - name: timeout
+      type: duration
+      default: 5m
+      description: Timeout for writing to Security Lake
 ---
 
-let $account_id = "{{ inputs.account-id }}"
-let $region = "{{ inputs.region }}"
-let $bucket = "{{ inputs.bucket-name }}"
-let $external_id = "{{ inputs.external-id }}"
-let $timeout = "{{ inputs.timeout }}".duration()
-
 assert class_uid != null
 to_amazon_security_lake \
   f"s3://{$bucket}/ext/tnz-ocsf-{class_uid}",
